name: jetson-sensevoice
description: Jetson Orin: SenseVoice offline ASR via a standalone TensorRT engine (fp16, activation-rescaled so Chinese activations stay fp16-safe; zh/en/ja/ko/yue). ASR-only transcription profile (no TTS) — SenseVoice encoder+CTC serves the offline /asr path. Validated on Orin Nano (TRT 10.4).
